title: NTM Interiors Resourcepack
description: Optional dependency for NTM Ait Interiors
body:
This is a **optional** dependency for [NTM Interiors AIT Datapack](https://modrinth.com/project/ntm-interiors-ait-datapack).
## Q & A
- **Q:** why do I need this resourcepack?
- **A:** This Resourcepack will add the name and image to the NTM interiors to the monitor in the Tardis console. It is not required but I do recomend it.
